app.title: Campus Integrated Smart Management System
app.subtitle: League office · Student org OA · Personal timeline

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loginHint: Sign in to use your dashboard:
dashboard.subtitleStudent: Timetable, plans, tasks, and your profile in one place.
dashboard.subtitleOrgAdmin: Manage your organization, coordinate tasks, and run activities.
dashboard.subtitleLeagueAdmin: Review profiles, manage orgs, and monitor the task board.
dashboard.quickEntryHint: Entries are ordered for your role.

desc.timeline: Personal plans, timetable, and upcoming items
desc.profile: Basic info, awards, and skill tags

hero.tagline: Your campus smart assistant now highlights the most important routes and metrics for your role.

multilingual.title: Trilingual experience
multilingual.desc: Switch between Chinese, English, and Russian for competition demos.

studentTime.title: Student task and time management
studentTime.desc: Track plans, tasks, and reminders in one focused workspace.

orgFlow.title: Organization workflow
orgFlow.desc: Cover activity initiation, co-organization review, and member sync.

leagueGovernance.title: League review and global control
leagueGovernance.desc: Handle approvals, organization governance, and global task oversight.

summary.title: Role summary
summary.student: Focus on personal tasks, schedule planning, and profile improvements.
summary.orgAdmin: Focus on organization activities, collaboration review, and member execution.
summary.leagueAdmin: Focus on global review, organization governance, and system-wide operations.

stats.title: Key metrics
stats.hint: Critical indicators are shown based on your current role.

orgModule.title: Organization Task Snapshot
orgModule.hint: Live summary based on existing task records for your organization scope.
orgModule.upcomingHint: {count} tasks are due in the next {hours} hours.

dashboard.quickExtraHint: Additional entries remain below for full showcase coverage.

roleSummary.student: Student-side priority: execute tasks, manage time, and maintain growth profile.
roleSummary.orgAdmin: Org-side priority: drive activities, coordinate approvals, and align members.
roleSummary.leagueAdmin: League-side priority: govern reviews, monitor global board, and manage organizations.

states.partialOverview: Global board is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
states.emptyDesc: Go to task center to create or review task data first.

studentHome.partialLoad: Some student assistant data is temporarily unavailable

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.deadlineFirst: Handle {count} near-deadline items first to avoid pile-up.
ai.taskFirst: Start with "{task}" and then move to secondary items.
ai.courseFirst: Prepare for "{course}" first, then switch to deep work tasks.
ai.focus: Finish one high-priority task first, then process messages and minor items.

deadlines.title: Upcoming Deadlines
deadlines.empty: No urgent deadlines in the next 48 hours

states.reviewUnavailable: Profile review stats are currently unavailable

review.title: Profile review distribution
